seoTitle: Point Lookout vs Pomona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Lookout and Pomona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Lookout vs Pomona: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Lookout and Pomona.
heading: Point Lookout vs Pomona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Lookout, Queensland and Pomona, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pomona has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Point Lookout (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Lookout or Pomona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Lookout has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Pomona scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Lookout scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Pomona scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Lookout or Pomona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pomona has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
